config.title: Platform configuration
config.subtitle: Live edits — effective immediately for new orders and sessions.

confirm.dangerous: This is a sensitive setting — double-check before saving.

flags.title: Feature flags
flags.subtitle: Toggle launch features without a deploy.

categories.name: Name

categories.orphanWarning: Cannot move without children — enable move-with-children.
